'''√y-w-t''' ('''kayawat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaake|quaake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaake|quaake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √y-w-t
|-
! Lemma
| kayawat
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiyawat || jiyawat || shiyawat || kiyawat
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuyawat || jujuyawat || shushuyawat || kukuyawat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuyawat || juyawat || shuyawat || kuyawat
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuyawat || juyawat || shuyawat || kuyawat
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theyawat || jeyawat || sheyawat || keyawat
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoyawat || jojoyawat || shoshoyawat || kokoyawat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoyawat || joyawat || shoyawat || koyawat
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoyawat || joyawat || shoyawat || koyawat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yawat || yawat || yawat || yawat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yawat || yawat || yawat || yawat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yawat || yawat || yawat || yawat
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yawat || yawat || yawat || yawat
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæyawat || jæyawat || shæyawat || kæyawat
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathayawat || jajayawat || shashayawat || kakayawat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thayawat || jayawat || shayawat || kayawat
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thayawat || jayawat || shayawat || kayawat
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shayawat
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshayawat
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishayawat
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shayawatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshayawatnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishayawatnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shayawatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshayawatnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishayawatshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shayawatro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshayawatnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishayawatro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shayawatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshayawatnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishayawatmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shayawatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshayawatnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishayawatsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shayawatng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshayawatnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishayawatng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shayawatya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshayawatnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishayawatya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shayawatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshayawatnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishayawatyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shayawatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshayawatnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishayawatnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shayawatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayawatnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayawatnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shayawatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshayawatnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayawatnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shayawatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshayawatnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishayawatshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shayawatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayawatnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayawatshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shayawatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshayawatnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayawatshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shayawatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshayawatnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishayawatronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shayawatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshayawatnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishayawatroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shayawatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshayawatnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayawatromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shayawatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshayawatnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishayawatmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shayawatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshayawatnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishayawatmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shayawatmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayawatnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayawatmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
